_comment: CANONICAL arsenal model registry - the ONE source of truth for per-weapon facts (semantic + routing + UI display). Consumers DERIVE from this; never hand-copy. Readers: summon.py (cloud_tag/role/known-ids), conformity_check.py (role), .claude/hooks/weapon-gate.py (known weapons), .claude/serve.cjs (weight), build.py (role + weaponStatus + emits the full registry into guild-data as GUILD.models for app.js), gen_model_docs.py (docs). role: doer|thinker|both|media (media normalized to doer for UI/ordering). status: live|reserve|deactivated. cloud_tag/pull null when N/A. weight = serve.cjs usage estimate. UI fields (label/color/tier/host/desc/ollama_desc/call/meter) drive the dashboard arsenal cards; glyph is derived from label in app.js.

opus.summary: Deepest structural reasoning — the prime thinker for hard plans.
opus.label: Opus
opus.desc: Claude Opus 4.8 — the master brain. Orchestrates the guild, reasons deepest, reviews everything. This IS the run.
opus.ollama_desc: Claude Opus 4.8 · Anthropic's most powerful model. Best for complex reasoning, deep analysis, agentic orchestration, and long-horizon planning. Top-tier on MMLU, HumanEval, MATH. Use for hard problems that need the best answer, not the fastest.
opus.call:
Native — no script. You ARE Opus, the orchestrator. Delegate sub-work via the Task tool: subagent_type + model:'opus'.
(python3 star-alliance-arsenal/summon.py opus just echoes this reminder.)

sonnet.summary: Balanced thinker + Claude-capable fallback — last in every arsenal.
sonnet.label: Sonnet
sonnet.desc: Claude Sonnet 4.6 — the reliable longsword. Fast, balanced daily dispatch.
sonnet.ollama_desc: Claude Sonnet 4.6 · Balanced speed and intelligence. Near-Opus quality at a fraction of the latency. Excels at coding, writing, analysis, and tool use. The go-to for reliable daily dispatch — fast enough for interactive use, smart enough for hard tasks.
sonnet.call: Native — no script. Task tool subagent, model:'sonnet'. Or switch the main loop with /model sonnet.

haiku.summary: Fastest, cheapest Claude — quick mechanical reasoning.
haiku.label: Haiku
haiku.desc: Claude Haiku 4.5 — the stiletto. Fastest and cheapest, for precise quick strikes.
haiku.ollama_desc: Claude Haiku 4.5 · Fastest and cheapest Claude. Sub-second responses, ideal for bulk classification, routing, summarization, and mechanical transforms. Use when you need high volume at low cost — not when you need deep reasoning.
haiku.call: Native — no script. Task tool subagent, model:'haiku' — cheap mechanical strikes.

minimax-m3.summary: The prime doer. Direct MiniMax cloud sub for bulk generation/transform.
minimax-m3.label: MiniMax M3
minimax-m3.desc: MiniMax M3 — the crossbow. Cheap, 1M context, fires bulk delegated work at range. Use the DIRECT cloud sub — the old Ollama minimax-m3 route is RETIRED.
minimax-m3.ollama_desc: MiniMax M3 · 1M context window, very cheap per token. Strong at long-document analysis, bulk text extraction, and summarization. The guild's primary sub-agent for delegated work. Use for anything where you need to process large inputs at low cost.
minimax-m3.call:
DIRECT cloud sub — NOT Ollama.
Easiest:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/minimax.py "<prompt>"
  flags: -s <system>  --json  -f <file>  (reads stdin if no arg)
Raw:  POST https://api.minimax.io/v1/text/chatcompletion_v2
  Authorization: Bearer $(cat ~/.config/minimax/m3.key)
  body { model:'MiniMax-M3', messages:[…], max_tokens:16000 }

meter.note: est · set your real plan cap

deepseek-v4-pro.summary: Frontier multi-step reasoning — long dependency chains.
deepseek-v4-pro.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro
deepseek-v4-pro.desc: DeepSeek V4 Pro — the scythe. Wide-sweeping frontier MoE reasoning.
deepseek-v4-pro.ollama_desc: DeepSeek V4 Pro · Mixture-of-Experts frontier reasoning at low cost. Exceptional at STEM, mathematics, and logical inference. Near GPT-4 quality for a fraction of the price. Best for hard analytical problems, algorithm design, and scientific reasoning.
deepseek-v4-pro.call:
Easiest:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/summon.py deepseek-v4-pro "<prompt>"
Direct:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/ollama_cloud.py deepseek-v4-pro:cloud "<prompt>"
Pull first:  ollama pull deepseek-v4-pro:cloud

glm-5.2.summary: A different analytical frame — where others over-fit.
glm-5.2.label: GLM-5.2
glm-5.2.desc: GLM-5.2 — the longbow. Coding-first, strong multilingual analysis. Long reach, pulled & ready.
glm-5.2.ollama_desc: GLM-5.2 · Zhipu AI's flagship. Coding-first with top LiveCodeBench performance. Strong multilingual capabilities — especially Chinese, Arabic, and European languages. Best for code review, multi-language tasks, and structured analytical work.
glm-5.2.call:
Easiest:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/summon.py glm-5.2 "<prompt>"
Direct:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/ollama_cloud.py glm-5.2:cloud "<prompt>"  (-s, --json, -f, stdin)
Ollama Cloud sub · tag glm-5.2:cloud

meter.note: est · shares the Ollama Cloud pool

kimi-k2.7.label: Kimi K2.7
kimi-k2.7.desc: Kimi K2.7 — the hammer. Long-horizon coding and agentic work, blunt force done right.
kimi-k2.7.ollama_desc: Kimi K2.7 · Moonshot AI's agentic powerhouse. Designed for long-horizon tool use, autonomous coding, and multi-step debugging. Strong at planning, self-correction, and sustained agentic loops. Best when a task requires many tool calls across a long session.
kimi-k2.7.call:
Easiest:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/summon.py kimi-k2.7 "<prompt>"
Direct:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/ollama_cloud.py kimi-k2.7-code:cloud "<prompt>"
Pull first:  ollama pull kimi-k2.7-code:cloud

nemotron-3-ultra.summary: NVIDIA reasoning bench — alternate engine. Reserve: in no loadout.
nemotron-3-ultra.label: Nemotron-3 Ultra
nemotron-3-ultra.desc: Nemotron-3 Ultra — the lance. High-throughput reasoning, long agent runs.
nemotron-3-ultra.ollama_desc: Nemotron-3 Ultra · NVIDIA's high-throughput reasoning model. Strong at structured data extraction, long-form document analysis, and sustained multi-turn agentic work. Optimized for inference efficiency — best when you need frontier reasoning at scale.
nemotron-3-ultra.call:
Easiest:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/summon.py nemotron-3-ultra "<prompt>"
Direct:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/ollama_cloud.py nemotron-3-super:cloud "<prompt>"
Pull first:  ollama pull nemotron-3-super:cloud

qwen3.5.summary: Strong general/coding bench. Reserve: in no loadout.
qwen3.5.label: Qwen 3.5
qwen3.5.desc: Qwen 3.5 — the shortsword. Versatile general-purpose workhorse.
qwen3.5.ollama_desc: Qwen 3.5 · Alibaba's versatile coder. Supports 29 languages, strong structured output, function calling, and API integration. Well-rounded across coding, writing, and analysis. Best for multilingual tasks and general-purpose work where flexibility matters.
qwen3.5.call:
Easiest:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/summon.py qwen3.5 "<prompt>"
Direct:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/ollama_cloud.py qwen3.5:cloud "<prompt>"
Pull first:  ollama pull qwen3.5:cloud

gemma4.summary: Light, fast thinker — cheap second mind, esp. content/marketing (the-herald).
gemma4.label: Gemma 4
gemma4.desc: Gemma 4 — the ninja star. Small, fast, deadly accurate for quick cheap passes.
gemma4.ollama_desc: Gemma 4 · Google's lightweight open model. Fast, compact, deployable anywhere. Strong instruction following, basic reasoning, and summarization at minimal cost. Best for high-volume quick passes, preprocessing, and tasks where speed and cost trump depth.
gemma4.call:
Easiest:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/summon.py gemma4 "<prompt>"
Direct:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/ollama_cloud.py gemma4:cloud "<prompt>"
Pull first:  ollama pull gemma4:cloud

gpt-5.5.summary: OpenAI-direct second opinion. Deactivated — no key on device; kept in loadouts on purpose.
gpt-5.5.label: GPT-5.5
gpt-5.5.desc: OpenAI GPT-5.5 — a US-hosted frontier second opinion. Premium-priced.
gpt-5.5.ollama_desc: OpenAI GPT-5.5 · OpenAI's flagship frontier model. Multimodal reasoning, world-class coding, and strong creative generation. Best used as a second opinion on hard problems, cross-validation, or tasks that benefit from a different model family's perspective.
gpt-5.5.call:
python3 star-alliance-arsenal/summon.py gpt-5.5  → reports NOT provisioned (no key on device).
When provisioned: OpenAI direct, POST api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions, Bearer $OPENAI_API_KEY, model:'gpt-5.5'.

meter.note: Not provisioned — no key on device yet

image-01.summary: Text→image forge. Forged every skill-art/*.png tile.
image-01.label: MiniMax Image
image-01.desc: MiniMax image-01 — the enchanter's brush. Paints 1024² skill-sigils and battle-standards from a spell-phrase. Forged every art tile in the armory.
image-01.ollama_desc: MiniMax image-01 · Text-to-image diffusion. 1024×1024, prompt-driven, strong on stylized/illustrative art. The guild's art forge — skill-art, weapon cards, member portraits. Use for any raster icon or illustration; M3 (text) cannot make pixels.
image-01.call:
DIRECT cloud · Bearer $(cat ~/.config/minimax/m3.key).
Easiest:  node gen-skill-art.cjs            (renders skill-art/<id>.png; skips existing, --regen <id> to force)
Raw:  POST https://api.minimax.io/v1/image_generation
  body { model:'image-01', prompt:'…', aspect_ratio:'1:1', response_format:'url', n:1 }

meter.note: est · set your real plan cap

minimax-video.label: MiniMax Hailuo
minimax-video.desc: MiniMax Hailuo — the scrying-loom. Weaves short moving visions (text/image → video) for banners and intro stings.
minimax-video.ollama_desc: MiniMax Hailuo video (MiniMax-Hailuo-02 / video-01) · Text-to-video and image-to-video, ~6s 720p clips. Async API: submit → poll task → retrieve file. Use for short motion — animated banners, weapon GIFs, intros.
minimax-video.call:
DIRECT cloud · Bearer $(cat ~/.config/minimax/m3.key).  No helper script yet.
Raw (async):  POST https://api.minimax.io/v1/video_generation  body { model:'MiniMax-Hailuo-02', prompt:'…' } → task_id
  Poll:  GET /v1/query/video_generation?task_id=…  → file_id
  Fetch:  GET /v1/files/retrieve?file_id=…   (verify current model tag)

meter.note: est · async video gen · set real cap

minimax-speech.label: MiniMax Speech
minimax-speech.desc: MiniMax Speech — the herald's horn. Gives any text a spoken voice (TTS), in many tongues and timbres.
minimax-speech.ollama_desc: MiniMax Speech (speech-02-hd / -turbo, T2A v2) · Text-to-speech. Multilingual, many voices, adjustable speed/pitch/emotion. Use for narration, voiced briefings, audio versions of reports.
minimax-speech.call:
DIRECT cloud · Bearer $(cat ~/.config/minimax/m3.key).  No helper script yet.
Raw:  POST https://api.minimax.io/v1/t2a_v2  body { model:'speech-02-hd', text:'…', voice_setting:{ voice_id:'…', speed:1 } } → audio
  (verify current voice ids + model tag)

meter.note: est · T2A billed per char · set real cap

minimax-music.label: MiniMax Music
minimax-music.desc: MiniMax Music — the bard's lute. Composes scored music from a brief: a mood, a verse, a length.
minimax-music.ollama_desc: MiniMax Music (music-1.5) · Generates instrumental or vocal music from a text brief + optional lyrics. Use for theme music, ambient loops, short scores.
